title: The role of entrepreneurs and intrapreneurs
summary: 9609 AS — entrepreneur characteristics, risk, innovation, and intrapreneurship within firms.
learningObjectives: Explain role of risk and innovation.

simpleExplanation.title: Who starts and drives change
simpleExplanation.summary: Entrepreneurs bear risk to create new ventures. Intrapreneurs innovate inside existing organisations with firm resources.
steps: Risk: financial and personal; reward is profit.
Intrapreneurship: lower personal risk, firm culture needed.

sections.content: **Entrepreneurs** (1.1.2) feature in **case study** Paper 2 questions. Link **traits** to **examples** — generic lists without application score poorly.
